name: Scottish Shortbread/Country Christmas
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees. Sift together flours. Beat butter and sugar in large bowl with electric mixer until creamy. Blend in three-quarters of the flour until mixture resembles fine crumbs. Stir in remaining flour by hand. Press dough firmly into ungreased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1 inch jelly-roll pan or two 9 inches fluted tart pans; crimp and flute edges, if desired. Bake 40-45 minutes until light brown. Place pan on wire rack. Cut into bars or wedges while warm. Decorate with candied fruit, if desired. Cool completely. Store in airtight containers. Makes about 4 dozen bars or 24 wedges
